input.background: We've established that heights of 10-year-old boys vary according to a Normal distribution with μ=138 centimeters and σ=7 centimeters.
input.question: What proportion is between 150 and 140 centimeters?

output.answer: Make use of the fact demonstrated in Figure 7.12 (page 142): Pr(140 ≤ X ≤ 150) = Pr(X ≤ 150) - Pr(X ≤ 140) = 0.9564 - 0.6141 = 0.3423
